summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Weekly Digest feature for Blogs 4 Blocks. Fixed routing issue with DELETE /api/admin/posts/expired-guests endpoint. All 19 backend tests passed. Admin Newsletter UI tab fully verified with Send Digest functionality working correctly.

GET /api/admin/digest-status - requires admin role (403) - PASS
GET /api/admin/digest-status - returns subscriber count, last digest, schedule info - PASS
GET /api/admin/digest-status - shows last digest info when available - PASS

fixes_applied.issue: DELETE /api/admin/posts/expired-guests returned 404 due to route ordering conflict with DELETE /api/admin/posts/{post_id}
fixes_applied.fix: Moved the specific route /admin/posts/expired-guests BEFORE the dynamic route /admin/posts/{post_id} to ensure proper route matching

seed_data_creation: Test newsletter subscribers created with TEST_ prefix during pytest run. A digest was sent during UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly Digest feature fully tested and working. Key endpoints: POST /api/newsletter/subscribe, POST /api/newsletter/unsubscribe, GET /api/admin/digest-status, POST /api/admin/send-digest, GET /api/admin/subscribers, DELETE /api/admin/posts/expired-guests. Admin UI has 6 tabs including Newsletter tab with digest management. APScheduler runs digest every Monday 9AM UTC. Resend API is used for email delivery (sandbox/free tier).

details: POST /api/newsletter/subscribe adds email to newsletter list
Handles already subscribed and resubscription cases
POST /api/newsletter/unsubscribe sets active=false
Gracefully handles non-existent emails
GET /api/admin/digest-status requires admin auth
Returns: active_subscribers, registered_users, total_audience, schedule, total_digests_sent, recent_logs, last_digest
total_audience = active_subscribers + registered_users
POST /api/admin/send-digest requires admin auth
Triggers digest email to all subscribers and registered users
Creates log entry in digest_log collection
Returns sent count and any errors
GET /api/admin/subscribers requires admin auth
Returns list of all newsletter subscribers with email, active status, subscribed_at
DELETE /api/admin/posts/expired-guests requires admin auth
Deletes all guest posts where expires_at <= now
Returns count of deleted posts
Newsletter tab visible in admin dashboard (6 tabs total)
Stats cards: Newsletter Subs, Registered Users, Total Audience, Digests Sent
Schedule section shows automation schedule
Manual Send section with working Send Digest Now button
Button shows 'Sending...' with spinner during operation
Recent Digest History shows sent digests with details
